source: Endpoint paths; Request header + Request body example (productName/amount/currency/orderId); Response envelope

parameters.name: currency
parameters.description: Currency code, e.g. TWD (from Request body example).

parameters.name: orderId
parameters.description: Merchant order ID (from Request body example).

request.description: JSON body. Only the four fields in the overview example are captured; the full v3 Request body (packages[], redirectUrls{confirmUrl,cancelUrl}, options) is on the JS-rendered sub-page and not in this source.

responses.description: HTTP 200 with the standard response envelope {returnCode, returnMessage, info}. returnCode 0000 = success; info present only on success.

missing: Full v3 Payment Request schema (packages[], redirectUrls{confirmUrl,cancelUrl}, options) not in this source — only the four example fields.
